name: Caesar Salad (Bdgm08b)
recipeIngredient: 2 anchovy fillets or 1 teaspoon fish sauce (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chopped romaine lettuce with grated Parmesan cheese.
2. Mince the garlic cloves finely.
3. Add minced garlic to the salad mixture and toss well.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together olive oil, salt, and pepper until combined.
5. Pour the dressing over the salad and mix gently until all ingredients are evenly coated.
6. Crack the eggs into a small dish and sprinkle with a pinch of salt and pepper.
7. (Optional) Add anchovy fillets or fish sauce for added flavor.
8. Arrange the leaves on a serving plate, drizzle with lemon juice, and top with the egg.
9. Serve immediately and enjoy your Caesar Salad.
